task: Review the flow and determine whether the primary task can be completed clearly and confidently.
frictionPoints: No clear call-to-action for first-time users to start with the free plan
Similar button labels for different plans (Go to Builder vs Subscribe)
confusionPoints: The difference between free and paid plans is somewhat detailed but could be more explicit for cautious users
No explicit statement about what happens after clicking 'Subscribe' or 'Go to Builder'
recommendations: Provide an explicit and prominent call-to-action for the free plan
Consider separate and clear actions for each plan to reduce confusion
Use more detailed and explicit helper text to clarify the implications of each choice
Consider adding a visual comparison chart to highlight plan differences
Make the next steps after plan selection clearer through additional instructions or visual cues
